title: Calm Valley
description: Settle down, start up your farm, or become the mayor of a buzzing town. Amazing aesthetics, ambiance, adventure.
body:
Settle down, start up your farm, or become the mayor of a buzzing town. But as you look at the sun setting on the horizon you wonder: what can you find beyond the horizon?

What started as a small modpack to enhance **that one specific feeling** you get when playing Minecraft, turned into a big pack full of stuff to enhance the building and farming experiences. All while hopefully still adding enough to entice you to explore what's beyond your valley. This is a carefully put together pack that hopes to encourage the player to fill in the lore themselves while exploring the world.

## Features
- 🧩 Over 300 total mods included
- 🤝 Created with multiplayer in mind, but just as fun in singleplayer
- 🔊 Atmospheric sounds and immaculate ambiance
- 🍂 Seasons and objects fitting each season
- 🧑 Lively villages and villagers to connect with
- 🏯 Many buildings to discover and create lore around
- 🦆 More animals to discover and tame
- 🌽 More crops to grow and expand your farm


[![Collage of Screenshots from the game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/x83G0eLO/images/9f618187ddea1d1660759e233bc2892d050e9793.png)](https://docs.rme.gg)

Make sure to check out the wiki over at [docs.rme.gg](https://docs.rme.gg)!


The modpack comes with two shaderpacks, and shaders are enabled by default. **It is recommended you play with shaders.** But feel free to disable them if they impact your performance too much.

Massive thank you and shoutout to [@Rebel459](https://modrinth.com/user/Rebel459) for their help and for providing a datapack to enhance this modpack. Make sure to check out [their Modpack "Legacies" as well](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacies).

<details>
<summary>My game never stops loading, help!</summary>

This is an issue caused (or at least resolvable) by **Elytra Trims**. The best solution to resolving this I’ve found is the following:

1. When it doesn’t stop loading: let the game sit on the loading screen for 3-5 minutes.
2. Quit the game, and disable the Elytra Trims mod.
3. Restart the game and it’ll get to the main menu no problem.
4. Re-enable the Elytra Trims mod and restart once again. The game should now load with the mod enabled.

I do hope this issue gets fixed, but it seems to be quite difficult to find the cause.
</details>
